query:
SELECT c.id, c.title, c.description 
FROM courses c
JOIN path_courses pc ON c.id = pc.courseId
JOIN learning_paths lp ON pc.pathId = lp.id
WHERE lp.level = 'beginner'
ORDER BY pc.courseOrder;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2KiCrCqNDFcXt7P.577d1a63eeb5 --database P2Dpw9MQsmxzdUQCfGjV6b --execute SELECT c.id, c.title, c.description 
FROM courses c
JOIN path_courses pc ON c.id = pc.courseId
JOIN learning_paths lp ON pc.pathId = lp.id
WHERE lp.level = 'beginner'
ORDER BY pc.courseOrder;
